name: vaultwatch-rwa-mcp
description: Domain-specific MCP server wrapping the VaultWatch RWA / risk smart contracts on Casper testnet — exposes AuditTrail, RiskOracle, RiskPolicyManager, SentinelAlertLog, SentinelCredit, SentinelRegistry, SubscriberVault, and AgentBehaviorIndex to any LLM agent (Claude Desktop, Cursor, Continue, Cody).
